/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DSPiConsole.dir/DSPiConsole_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSPiConsole.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSPiConsole.dir/src/DSPiBridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSPiConsole.dir/src/BodePlotItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSPiConsole.dir/src/MeterItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DSPiConsole.dir/DSPiConsole_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o DSPiConsole -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtQuickControls2.framework/QtQuickControls2 "/Users/weeblabs/DSPi Console Unified/qt/../target/release/libdspi_core.a" /opt/homebrew/opt/libusb/lib/libusb-1.0.dylib -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libobjc.tbd -framework SystemConfiguration /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtQuick.framework/QtQuick /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtQmlModels.framework/QtQmlModels /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtQml.framework/QtQml /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtNetwork.framework/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
